ideas.headline: ELENXIS Auditor Copilot survives second-pass: clean champion path to AADE Governor, fresh UK/NL/Spain precedents, designable Netcompany overlay route, and a founder profile that is recruitable from Big-4 Athens tax-controversy bench within 90 days.
blockers: Netcompany-Intrasoft will lobby to have any ELENXIS overlay routed through them as a change request — needs explicit Governor-level air cover for the carve-out before kickoff.
EU AI Act high-risk classification forces a DPIA and AI-Act traceability log to be in place before pilot day 1; non-trivial legal-engineering work for a first-time founder.
ELENXIS API access is gated behind authorised-contractor status; the 30-60 day clearance loop is the real critical path, not the model.
ideas.next30days: Book a 45-min Governor / ΓΓ Διοίκησης meeting (warm intro via ex-AADE Big-4 partner) to pre-register a 10-auditor ΚΕΦΟΜΕΠ pilot with 3 KPIs (closed cases/auditor/month, draft-to-issue median, euros assessed) and request the ESPA innovation-pilot procurement route in writing.

ideas.headline: TP Review Agent for ΚΕΦΟΜΕΠ survives second-pass: Spain AEAT 2026 Tax Control Plan now explicitly mandates AI/predictive TP risk analytics, giving live procurement cover; ΚΕΦΟΜΕΠ Director is reachable; Big-4 TP-partner founder pool is small but identifiable in Athens.
blockers: Founder recruit is the binding constraint: one ex-Big-4 Greek TP partner who'll switch sides is the entire deal — fewer than ~10 credible names in Athens.

Amadeus/Orbis comparables licensing is a non-trivial OPEX line that will be probed in any pilot budget — needs a published-data fallback (CbCR aggregates, public-filing comparables) to keep capital efficiency credible.
Court-defensibility of comparables is the buyer's killer question; every output must trace to OECD chapter + statute + comparable record or the first MAP/APA challenge kills the reference.
ideas.next30days: Land a retro-pilot offer on 5 closed ΚΕΦΟΜΕΠ TP cases (in-kind, NDA-bound) to produce a same-quality-in-25%-time benchmark; in parallel, run a structured 90-day founder hunt across Deloitte/PwC/KPMG/EY Athens TP partners with a co-founder equity package pre-modelled.

ideas.headline: myDATA × Bank-Flow Anomaly Agent is conditional: Italy VeRA chatbot live and HMRC Quantexa £175M sovereign-AI deal signed March 2026 make 'why not buy theirs' the central buyer objection; only ride-in path is as the lead-generation layer behind the ELENXIS copilot beachhead.
blockers: Procurement vehicle for €200-400k pilot is in the awkward middle — too big for απευθείας ανάθεση, smaller than a clean ESPA call; risk of slipping to full ΕΣΗΔΗΣ.

HMRC Quantexa £175M 10-yr sovereign-data deal (signed March 2026) is the new 'why not Quantexa' incumbency objection — needs a Greek-language + myDATA-schema + on-prem narrative the Governor can defend in parliament.
DPIA on bank-flow × taxpayer ledger join is the hardest of the five — toeslagenaffaire optics force a strictly copilot-only design with auditor-in-the-loop on every lead.
Founder pair (banking-payments data engineer + tax-evasion economist) is uncommon in Athens; ex-Profile / ex-Viva candidates exist but rare.
ideas.next30days: Treat as a fast-follow on the ELENXIS copilot — do not pitch standalone. Produce a 6-page brief that scopes a closed-month retro on one prior quarter of myDATA + bank-data, with a 200-leads / ≥25% positive-close target, and table it only after the copilot pilot signs.

ideas.headline: ICISnet Customs Anomaly Agent is conditional: clean blue-ocean in EU-Mediterranean ports and Brazil HARPIA precedent holds, but champion is one Piraeus Director rather than the Governor, founder recruit (ex-customs ops insider) is the scarcest of all five, and ICISnet feed access is a Netcompany-gated 9-month negotiation.
blockers: Founder-market fit (axis 2): the ex-customs operations insider needed is a single-digit recruit pool in Athens; without them the pitch is generic ML.
Real-time ICISnet feed is gated by Netcompany — pilot must fall back to T+1 batch and lose the 'pre-clearance' framing, which weakens the Director's KPI story.
Brazil HARPIA is the lone fresh precedent and is somewhat thinly documented in English; EU-side equivalents are still policy frameworks (DG TAXUD CRMF) not deployments.
Political tailwind is lower than VAT-gap surfaces — customs revenue is steady-state, not a press cycle, which makes Governor-level air cover harder to win.
ideas.next30days: Park as a side-car. Spend 30 days on founder discovery only — map ex-Piraeus Port Authority, ex-DG TAXUD Brussels secondees, and ex-Telωνειακή Ακαδημία instructors. Do not approach the Director of Customs until a credible operations co-founder is signed.

ideas.headline: VAT Carousel Graph Agent is conditional: AEAT TESEO (530M+ connectivity arcs, 49 relation types) and HMRC Quantexa graph stack are both operational in 2026, making the 'buy AEAT/Quantexa' objection sharper than original red-team caught; capital intensity and 9-month data-access negotiation push it firmly behind the copilot in sequencing.
blockers: Founder-market fit (axis 2): senior graph-ML engineer + ex-ΥΕΔΔΕ insider is even rarer than the customs pair; original red-team flagged this and it remains the binding constraint.
Pilot procurability (axis 2): €400k-1M pilot on country-scale myDATA + ΓΕΜΗ + bank data is full ΕΣΗΔΗΣ territory — no clean απευθείας ανάθεση or ESPA-innovation path.

Spain TESEO and HMRC Connect (Quantexa, contract live March 2026) have ridden through their 2025-2026 procurements with results that AADE can cite — the 'why not buy theirs' objection is harder to answer than for the copilot.
Entity-resolution at Greek-name scale (διακριτικός τίτλος vs επωνυμία variants) is a real technical lift that consumes capital before any pilot revenue.
ΥΕΔΔΕ is a more closed buyer than ΚΕΦΟΜΕΠ — the operational-secrecy culture makes a 'come in and show us' demo harder to even schedule.
ideas.next30days: Hard park. Use the 30 days to build a synthetic-data graph demo on public ΓΕΜΗ + sanitised myDATA-shape data that reproduces 3 historical Greek carousel cases retrospectively; bank the demo for an air-cover meeting with ΥΕΔΔΕ Director only after the ELENXIS copilot pilot is signed and a Greek-name entity-resolution moat has been benchmarked.
